title: calea robinsoniana
intro: Calea robinsoniana, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calea robinsoniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Herbal preparations of Calea robinsoniana typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
